name: Luscious Lemon-Filled Cupcakes
recipeIngredient: 2 tbsp Cornstarch, dissolved in 1-cup cold water
recipeInstructions:
Makes 1 to 1-1/2 dozen
Preheat oven to 325°F. Butter muffin tins or line with paper cups.
Sift flour with baking powder and nutmeg into a bowl.
In a large bowl, beat together butter and honey for 3 minutes until smooth.
Add egg yolks and continue beating until fluffy. Mix in lemon juice.
Add flour mixture and milk alternately to the butter mixture, beating well after each addition.
Using half of the batter, fill tins about 1/3 full with cupcakes.
Add 1 teaspoon lemon filling to each cupcake.
Top each cupcake with remaining batter.
Bake for 20 to 25 minutes until golden brown and a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
Allow to cool completely before serving.
